name: What if symptoms of AI malpractice show up late, like bar investigation?
description: Tolls until discovered; act on bar probes.[1]

mainEntity.name: What if symptoms of AI malpractice show up late, like bar investigation?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tolls until discovered; act on bar probes.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: File within discovery rule; NY malpractice tolls until harm known. Levidow sanctions triggered delayed scrutiny.[1] Key factors: diligence, documentation. Track bar notices, preserve evidence. Consult promptly.
